mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.mobile, p.kyc_status FROM btg_sys_user u LEFT JOIN btg_user_profile p ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE u.referrer_user_id = #{referrerUserId} ORDER BY u.id ASC
SELECT u.id, u.mobile, p.kyc_status FROM btg_sys_user u LEFT JOIN btg_user_profile p ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE u.ancestor_path LIKE CONCAT(#{pathPrefix}, '%') ORDER BY u.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM btg_sys_user WHERE ancestor_path LIKE CONCAT(#{pathPrefix}, '%')
